ValidationRule.description: Stellt sicher, dass das Feld BusinessCase__c ausgefüllt ist, wenn der Account-Status 'Signed', 'Live', 'OnHold' oder 'Terminated' ist (bei MP Partnern)
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL( BusinessUnit__c , "All"), ISPICKVAL( BusinessUnit__c , "Marketplace"), ISPICKVAL( BusinessUnit__c , "MarketplaceRetail"), ISPICKVAL( BusinessUnit__c , "MarketplaceAdSales") ), OR( ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "Signed"), ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "Live"), ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "OnHold"), ISPICKVAL( Status__c , "Terminated") ), ISBLANK( BusinessCase__c ) )
